name: Russian Democratic Federal Republic
description:
She doesn't need to be an angel with a pure soul,

She doesn't need to hold power with an iron fist.

She doesn't need to sacrifice herself to evil.

After all, that's not what she'll be valued for.

. . .

God will forgive her any sins.

Song excerpts "Аве" (Ave) by Otto Dix

———′•′———

End of May 1917.

Dual power is a period in Russian history when the country was ruled by two centers of power. Provisional Government (RDFR) and Petrograd Council of Workers' and Soldiers' Deputies (RSFSR)

Petrograd — St. Petersburg.
creator: Nightkiller_Canon
